eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Honolulu, HI; at 12:00 PM ON MAR 20, 2026 Effective until 01:00 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: From Oahu Department of Emergency Management. WAHIAWA DAM HAS NOT FAILED BUT IS AT IMMINENT RISK OF FAILURE. Potential life-threatening flooding of downstream areas.. Evacuation order still in effect. LEAVE downstream area NOW! Heavy traffic-Please carpool. WAHIAWA DAM EVACUATION ZONE includes all of Haleiwa between Puuiki St and Kamehameha Hwy. Areas of Waialua between Kukea Circle to Otake Camp.  Check alert.hnlalert.gov for updates or monitor local radio and TV stations.. This message will be updated in 4 hours or sooner if the situation changes.
